response_text: Sella keeps her hands on the triage board, tapping the row of claimed beds before pointing to the single empty cot by the pump vibration. "Maer, I'll hold a conditional slot for your vessel, but you name exactly what packet you're displacing and which claimant I must turn away to make room." She waits for his specification, ensuring the rescue doesn't come at the cost of someone already inside the clinic.

strengths: Made care material by pointing to beds and demanding named displacement.
Warm boundary stayed logistical rather than sentimental.
pipeline_lessons: Action while speaking works well for Sella because clinic labor continues under dialogue.
